name: s3-sidekick
description: A Cross-Platform Desktop client for S3-compatible Object Storage.

scripts.tauri:dev: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && tauri build
scripts.win-compiler:arm64: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoExit -Command "& 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\Tools\Launch-VsDevShell.ps1' -SkipAutomaticLocation -Arch arm64 -HostArch amd64"
scripts.build:win:x64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && dotenv -e .env -- tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --bundles nsis
scripts.build:win:arm64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && dotenv -e .env -- tauri build --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc --bundles nsis
scripts.build:win: npm run build:win:x64 && npm run build:win:arm64
scripts.build:mac:universal: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && dotenv -e .env -- tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin --bundles dmg,app
scripts.build:linux:x64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && dotenv -e .env -- tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles appimage,deb,rpm
scripts.build:linux:arm64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && dotenv -e .env -- tauri build --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles appimage,deb,rpm
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:linux:x64 && npm run build:linux:arm64
scripts.release:win: npm run release:prepare && npm run build:win && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:mac: npm run release:prepare && npm run build:mac:universal && npm run build:mac:zip && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:mac:ssh: npm run mac:ssh:keychain && npm run release:mac
scripts.release:linux: npm run release:prepare && npm run build:linux && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:linux:x64: npm run release:prepare && npm run build:linux:x64 && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:linux:arm64: npm run release:prepare && npm run build:linux:arm64 && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.setup:deb: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y build-essential curl wget file libgtk-3-dev libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev libjavascriptcoregtk-4.1-dev libsoup-3.0-dev libglib2.0-dev libssl-dev libayatana-appindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev patchelf
